title: What Scripture actually says about doubt
caption:
Doubt isn’t the opposite of faith. It might be the most honest thing you’ve prayed in a while.

Every man hits seasons where the silence feels loud. Where the faith that felt easy at 16 feels complicated at 24.

Bring it to God anyway. The Psalms look exactly like that.

#faith #doubt #christianmen #scripture #menoffaith #godlymen #manofgod #christianity
